context:
INTEL
=====
📌The group initially spotted in May 2024
📌So far, they have compromised about 24 victims (as of June 2025)
📌Affected countries includes: 🇨🇦 🇹🇼 🇰🇷 🇯🇵 🇫🇷 🇪🇸 🇸🇰 🇸🇬
📌Most affected country is: Canada, Taiwan and S.Korea
📌The group maintains DLS on Dark Web
📌They began to advertise their group on Telegram Channels since February 2025
📌Underground maintains seperate communication channel for negotiation on Dark Web
📌Victim data is encrypted using BCrypt, DES
